title: Buying Sports Equipment 买运动装备
scene: Mike去体育用品店买篮球和护膝。

lines.en: Excuse me, I want to buy a basketball.
lines.zh: 打扰一下，我想买一个篮球。

lines.en: Sure! Are you playing indoors or outdoors?
lines.zh: 当然！你是在室内还是室外打？

lines.en: Mostly outdoors, on the school playground.
lines.zh: 大多数时候在室外，在学校操场上。

lines.en: Then I recommend this rubber basketball. It's very durable.
lines.zh: 那我推荐这款橡胶篮球。很耐用。

lines.en: That looks good. How much is it?
Eighty-nine yuan. Do you need anything else?
lines.zh: 八十九元。您还需要别的吗？

lines.en: Yes, I also need knee pads. I hurt my knee last week.
lines.zh: 是的，我还需要护膝。我上周伤了膝盖。

lines.en: Oh, I'm sorry to hear that. These knee pads are very protective.
lines.zh: 哦，听到这个我很遗憾。这些护膝保护性很好。

lines.en: Good! I'll take a pair. How much are they?
Thirty-five yuan. Total is one hundred and twenty-four yuan.
lines.zh: 三十五元。总共一百二十四元。
